title: Lentil and Algerian Stew Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with lentils, Algerian spices, and served in a bowl. This dish is perfect for a warm and comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, and Algerian stew spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, reduced vegetable broth, and salt. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season the stew with salt to taste.
Serve the stew hot in bowls.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice, if desired.
